name: ALTER Identity
description: Identity infrastructure for the AI economy. 33-trait psychometric engine delivering verified human identity via MCP — belonging probability, trait vectors, attunement depth, and privacy-gated inference. Free tier: 16 tools, 10 req/min, 100 req/day.

inputs.label: ALTER API Key (optional)
inputs.description: Optional API key for premium tier access. Free tier (16 tools, 10 req/min, 100 req/day) works without any API key.

obtain.instructions: Sign up at truealter.com to get a premium API key. Free tier requires no credentials.

auth.instructions: Free tier requires no API key. For premium access, obtain a key at https://truealter.com
